[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Atril Neff''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[immigration officer]] in the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin's]] [[Bespin Wing Guard/Legends|Wing Guard]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During her service, Neff's job was to know everyone who entered and left Bespin's [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Neff was present on Cloud [[City/Legends|City]] during Bespin's [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Occupation of Bespin|occupation]], when her curiosity was piqued by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] presence. For that reason, she tried to catch a glimpse of the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] whenever possible.

==Biography==
The [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="JKTCG" /> [[Gender/Legends|female]]<ref name="SWI" /> Atril Neff served as an [[immigration officer]] with the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in<ref name="JKTCG" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin's]]<ref name="ESB">{{Film|V}}</ref> [[Bespin Wing Guard/Legends|Wing Guard]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. She<ref name="JKTCG" /> had a brother named [[Allen Neff|Allen]],<ref name="FB">{{Facebook|username=star-wars-sourcebooks|url=notes/star-wars-sourcebooks/naming-the-cloud-city-wing-guards/714850175231759|name=Star Wars Sourcebooks|date=Mar 6, 2014|archivefile=File:Wing_Guards_FB.png}}</ref> who hailed from the planet [[Ertegas/Legends|Ertegas]] and moved to Bespin at age six, eventually following his sister into service in the Wing Guard.<ref name="SWI" /> Neff's job in the Wing Guard was to know everyone who entered and left Bespin's [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]].<ref name="JKTCG2">{{JKTCG|set=Scum and Villainy|cardname=Lieutenant Neff • Quick Draw|link=http://www.decipher.com/jediknights/cardlists/scumandvillainy/large/47lieutenantneffquickdraw.html}}</ref> She was present on Cloud [[City/Legends|City]]<ref name="JKTCG" /> when Imperial forces led by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] [[Occupation of Bespin|occupied]] Bespin<ref name="ESB" /> in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[occupation of Bespin]] to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].</ref>

==Personality and traits==
Good at her assigned job,<ref name="JKTCG2" /> Neff knew who entered and left Cloud City. Her curiosity was piqued by [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Vader's presence<ref name="JKTCG" /> on Bespin during the Imperial occupation.<ref name="ESB" /> Due to her curiosity, she tried to catch a glimpse of the Dark [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] whenever possible.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|367|Neff, Officer}}</ref> Neff had light skin.<ref name="JKTCG" />

==Equipment==
During Lieutenant Neff's service in the Bespin Wing Guard, she wore the standard [[Clothing/Legends|uniform]] and was armed with a [[Relby-k23 blaster pistol]].<ref name="JKTCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
The first source mentioning Lieutenant Neff was a card for the [[Premiere (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Premiere'']] set of [[Decipher]]'s [[2001]] ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]''.<ref name="JKTCG" /> On [[March 11]], [[2014]],<ref name="Titan">{{TitanMagazines|url=t/star-wars-insider/us/148|text=Star Wars Insider Issue #148}}</ref> Neff was briefly mentioned and given the first name "Atril" in the [[Rogues Gallery (department)|''Rogues Gallery'']] department in the [[Star Wars Insider 148|148th issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine.<ref name="SWI" />
